name: Sparinvest SICAV - Investment Grade Value Bonds
summary: Sparinvest SICAV - Investment Grade Value Bonds is an open ended fixed income mutual fund launched by Sparinvest S.A. The fund is managed by Sparinvest Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. It invests in fixed income markets. The fund primarily invests in investment grade corporate fixed income transferable securities (i.e. that are rated BBB- or better. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against Merrill Lynch Global Broad Market Corporate Index (EUR Hedged).  Sparinvest SICAV - Investment Grade Value Bonds was formed on October 31, 2006 and is domiciled in Luxembourg.
